discountAccount.description: Indicates if account is a discount account.

escrowAccount.description: Indicates if account is a escrow account.

excludeFrom1099.description: Indicates if account is excluded from Form1099.

excludeFromPayInFull.description: Indicates if account is excluded from paying in full.

excludeLateFee.description: Indicates if excluding from late fees.

rentAccount.description: Indicates if account is a rent account.

taxAccount.description: Indicates if account is a tax account.

transferBalanceToRetainedEarnings.description: Indicates if Transfer balance at year end to Retained earnings.
